info.name: API JosJis v1
info.description:
This collection covers the core API endpoints for an e-commerce backend running on `http://localhost:3000`. It is organized around three main functional areas:

**Authentication**  
Handles user identity management, including registering a new account (`Register`), signing in (`Login`), and signing out (`Log Out`).

**Products**  
Provides full CRUD operations for the product catalog: retrieving all products (`Product Get`), updating a product's details (`Update Product`), and removing a product (`Delete Product`).

**Inventory**  
Manages stock-level data for products, supporting retrieval of a specific inventory record (`Inventory Get`), adding new inventory entries (`Create Inventory`), modifying existing ones (`Update Inventory`), and deleting records (`Delete Inventory`).

Use this collection to develop, test, and validate the authentication flow and the product/inventory management features of the e-commerce API.
